core_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and function-first. The crypto launchpad must feel like a precision engineering tool, not a chaotic neon casino. Use stark contrasts, visible grids, and zero border radius. Every element should feel deliberate and trustworthy for Mainnet deployments.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6 or p-8 for cards to provide generous breathing room. Use gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use strict 1px solid borders (border-zinc-300) for all containers, headers, and grid items to emphasize the technical structure.
layout_and_spacing.radius: 0px (rounded-none everywhere). Override default Shadcn radii to enforce Brutalist/Swiss aesthetic.

surfaces_and_components.header: Solid White bg-white with a hard bottom border border-b border-zinc-300. Sticky top, z-50. Include a 'Mainnet' badge.
surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat background bg-white, 1px border border-zinc-300, NO soft ambient shadows. On hover, use a sharp solid offset shadow: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] and -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary CTA uses bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800. Action buttons use sharp corners and bold text. Revoke/Warning actions use the destructive red color.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-300 focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black rounded-none. Left-aligned, high contrast text.
surfaces_and_components.tables_lists: border-collapse. border-b border-zinc-300 on rows. Left-aligned data. Dense padding for high scanability.
surfaces_and_components.modals_dialogs: Flat solid white background with sharp borders. No glassmorphism.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard shadows (Neo-brutalist style) on card hover. Explicit text color changes on interactive elements (e.g., hover:bg-black hover:text-white).

page_specific_instructions.global_navigation: Include a prominent Top Header. Left: Logo/Brand. Center: Navigation Links ('Launchpad', 'Explorer', 'Airdrop'). Right: Network Indicator ('Mainnet') and 'Connect Wallet' button (Phantom/Solflare).
page_specific_instructions.token_creation_form: Implement a Bento-grid layout for the form. Break it down logically: 1. Core Info (Name, Symbol, Supply, Decimals). 2. Metadata (Description, Image Upload/URL, Logo URL, Social Links). 3. Authorities (Toggles for Revoke Mint, Revoke Freeze, Revoke Update). Use explicit 'data-testid' for all form fields.
page_specific_instructions.authority_management: Highlight these as critical security features inside the creation flow. Use switches (Shadcn Switch) with distinct states. Revoking authorities is the secure path (Success/Neutral color), keeping them should show a warning indicator.
page_specific_instructions.token_list_explorer: A dense, high-clarity data table showing deployed tokens. Columns: Token Name/Symbol, Total Supply, Mint Authority Status, Freeze Authority Status, and a 'View on Explorer' link.
page_specific_instructions.airdrop_functionality: A dedicated clean section. Require: Token Mint Address input, a Textarea for a CSV list of wallet addresses and amounts, and a massive 'Execute Airdrop' button. Emphasize data validation visually before execution.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup @phosphor-icons/react for all icons.
Implement Cabinet Grotesk font for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Add these via standard imports (Google Fonts/Fontshare) in index.css.
Update Tailwind config (--radius: 0rem) and remove rounded classes from Shadcn components to enforce the strict Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
Ensure the 'Connect Wallet' feature includes mock or real Phantom and Solflare states (use React Wallet Adapter if possible, or visually mock the connected states for Phantom/Solflare).
For the Token Creation form, heavily utilize Shadcn Form (react-hook-form + zod) for robust validation.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-token-submit', data-testid='connect-wallet-btn').
Do NOT use soft drop shadows. Ensure hover effects rely on sharp 1px borders and hard offset shadows (Neo-brutalist style).
